app.title: The Heart Follows the Melody
app.subtitle: Learn numbered notation and piano keys
app.user_goal: For beginners and choir members who need to map numbered notation (1–7) to piano keys and simple melodies.
app._home_notation_note: Twinkle, Twinkle, Little Star — full numbered notation

lessons.heading: First Lesson!
lessons.subheading: Seven numbers correspond to seven Solfege syllables
bullets: The white key just to the left of them is Do.
Then it goes: Do, Re, Mi, Fa, Sol, La, Si, Do.
aside: The “do” located at the center of the piano keyboard is called Middle C.
On a standard 88-key piano, it is the fourth C.
lessons.instructions: Read the steps, then go to the next page to match numbers with keys.

lessons.heading: Match the numbers with the keys
lessons.subheading: Seven numbers correspond to seven Solfege syllables
lessons.instructions: Click a number in the top row of the table to open that note's lesson (1 → do, 2 → re, …, 7 → si).

lessons.heading: do

detail.body: The number 1 corresponds to the 1st white key in the scale you are studying, which is the sound of do.

lessons._listen_audio_note: 本地 little-star.wav；若每个音单独文件可改为 /static/audio/do.wav 等
lessons.instructions: Use Return to go back to the table, or Next to continue to re.

lessons.heading: re

detail.body: The number 2 corresponds to the 2nd white key on the piano keyboard in this octave pattern, which is the sound of re.

lessons._listen_audio_note: 本地 little-star.wav（可与各课相同或换成 re 专用文件）
lessons.instructions: Continue through the scale one note at a time.

lessons.heading: mi

detail.body: The number 3 corresponds to the 3rd white key on the keyboard in this pattern, which is the sound of mi.

lessons.instructions: Notice how each step follows the white keys in order.

lessons.heading: fa

detail.body: The number 4 corresponds to the 4th white key on the piano keyboard, which is the sound of fa.

lessons.instructions: You will use this mapping in the quiz.

lessons.heading: sol

detail.body: The number 5 corresponds to the 5th white key on the piano keyboard, which is the sound of sol.

lessons.instructions: Keep the order do–re–mi–fa–sol–la–si in mind.

lessons.heading: la

detail.body: The number 6 corresponds to the 6th white key on the piano keyboard, which is the sound of la.

lessons.instructions: Almost at the top of the scale.

lessons.heading: si

detail.body: The number 7 corresponds to the 7th white key on the piano keyboard, which is the sound of si.

lessons.instructions: After this lesson, try the quiz to test what you learned.

lessons.heading: Synthesis — review
bullets: Numbers 1–7 map to do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, si.
Pay attention to the order of the white keys.
Middle C helps you find your place on the keyboard.
lessons.instructions: When you are ready, open Quiz from the navigation bar and answer five questions.

quiz.prompt: Look at the notation on the left. The digit in the red box is the one to match to a white key.
quiz.subprompt: Drag the correct keyboard (one highlighted key) into the center box.
quiz.feedback_wrong: The boxed number is 1, which is the key do.

quiz.prompt: The keyboard on the left shows one key highlighted in red.
quiz.subprompt: Drag the notation card that contains the same number as that key (sol = 5).
quiz.feedback_wrong: Sol is 5 — pick the notation image that includes the digit 5.

quiz.prompt: The keyboard on the left shows one key highlighted in red.
quiz.subprompt: Drag the notation that contains the same number as that key (fa = 4).
quiz.feedback_wrong: Fa is 4 — pick the notation that includes the digit 4.

quiz.tips: In this lesson, re is number 2 — the second white key in the scale. Find the keyboard strip where that key is highlighted in red (not the 1st, 3rd, or 5th key).
quiz.prompt: Four keyboard fragments are shown — each has one white key highlighted in red.
quiz.subprompt: Drag the picture that shows re (2) into the box.
quiz.feedback_wrong: Re is the 2nd white key in the scale — pick the keyboard with that key highlighted.

quiz.subprompt: Drag the correct key image into the box.
quiz.feedback_wrong: La is the 6th white key in this pattern.
